# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

services:
  - name: service-1
    url: http://microservice-1:3000
    routes:
      - name: route-1
        paths:
          - /service-1
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          second: 10
          policy: local
  - name: service-2
    url: http://microservice-2:3000
    routes:
      - name: route-2
        paths:
          - /service-2
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - http://example.com
  - name: service-3
    url: http://microservice-3:3000
    routes:
      - name: route-3
        paths:
          - /service-3
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
    plugins:
      - name: jwt
        config:
          claims_to_verify:
            - exp
            - nbf
